English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Media and Technology Services records
Cornell University. Media and Technology Services
Whittle, Christopher.
21-36-3152
5.3 cubic feet. 5.3 cubic feet.
1968-1996. Correspondence, reports, policies, slides, photographs, and videotapes Correspondence, reports, policies, slides, photographs, videotapes, and other material of the office of Media and Technology Services; including the files of the first director Christopher Whittle and information on the New York State Fair, Empire Farm Days and the Educational Television Center. Collection material in English <<<<<<< HEAD 6 ======= 6 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab 4029868
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
July 2016
EAD encoding:
Marcie Farwell, July 2016
Date modified:
RMC Staff, July 2016
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence, reports, policies, slides, photographs, videotapes, and other material of the office of Media and Technology Services; including the files of the first director Christopher Whittle and information on the New York State Fair, Empire Farm Days and the Educational Television Center.
Cite As:
Media and Technology Services Records, #21-36-3152. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Videotapes. Photographs. Slides (photographs). College publicity. Cornell University. Media Services Cornell University -- : Publicity. Cornell University. Educational Television Center Empire Farm Days New York State Fair -- : Syracuse.
4029868 <<<<<<< HEAD Link to a partial finding aid.
Scope and Contents
All the material in the collection may not be covered by this guide.Series I. List of FilesChristopher Whittle: First Director of Media Services1975-07-1986-0411History of the Acquisition and Use of a Mobile Satellite Uplink Truckdate unknown12Media Services Space Study: An Attempt to Create a Single Building to House the Departmentdate unknown13Media and Technology Services backgrounddate unknown14ETV, Educational Television Center, miscellaneous background and history1975-200115ETV Center early history1968-197416
Scope and Contents
When the ETV Center was first created in the new wing of MVR Hall, College of Human Ecology, it was administered by the Department of Communication Arts. In 1975, when the Broadhead report created the Department of Media Services, separate from Communication Arts, the ETV Center was merged into the new Media Services Department under Christopher WhittleFood and Life Sciences Quarterly/FOCUS: History of the College of Agriculture's Journal of Research for a Lay Audience and Media Services Role in its Productiondate unknown17Miscellaneous Media Services organization chartsdate unknown18CALS 75th Anniversary multi-media showdate unknown19David, Watkins Jr. - Second Director of Media Services1986-04-2000-12110Empire Farm Days: Media Services roledate unknown111CCESN, Cornell Cooperative Extension Satellite Network Downlink Sitesdate unknown112CCESN Surveydate unknown113CCESN: Creation of..date unknown114CCESN: Evaluations of major programsdate unknown115Additional Satellite Uplink Truck Historydate unknown116Media Services: Distribution Centerdate unknown117Media Services: Creation of University Photographydate unknown118Media Services: Historical policy and informationdate unknown119Media Services: Policy and pricingdate unknown120Asia tour: ETV Center and Cornell Glee Clubdate unknown121Media Services: Television and Radiodate unknown122Media Services: Nutrition PSA's, ETV Centerdate unknown123Media Services: Marketing, mission, values and philosophydate unknown124Media Services: Computer aided publishingdate unknown125Media Services: Radio: FOCUS proposal to go national with NPR type programmingdate unknown126Media Services: Computer Network: Creation of…date unknown127Media and Technology Services: Web Production Unit, creation and costsdate unknown128Photos: State Fair youth building - Miscellaneous Files/Reports/ProposalsSave Energy/Save Dollars: A Copy of Products and Resultsdate unknown31Save Energy/Save Dollars Slidesdate unknown32Publication study by J. Francis Cooper1963-0433ETV Center policies1988-198934Ed Wright letters: (first chief engineer of the ETV Center)1968-196935Cornell Sports Network proposal by Media Services staff1990-0636Communication perception/needsdate unknown37
Scope and Contents
A study commissioned by David Watkins for a grad student in the Department of Communication Arts of the Communication Needs and Perceptions of Extension Field StaffEmpire Farm Days1995-199638MS. Distribution Center Report199839Robert Seem committee communication needs report and notesdate unknown310Telecommunications report commissioned by William Lacy, Director, Cornell Cooperative Extension1997311State of the Media Services Unit1999-05312Policies and procedures, Media Services1975-2000313Media and Technology Services self study document prepared for the departmental external review2000-04314Cornell Cooperative Extension public awareness files and products produced by Media Servicesdate unknown315Proposal for regional training and satellite downlink sitesdate unknown316CCESN, Cornell Cooperative Extension Satellite Network Background/Networkdate unknown317Broadhead Report: Study of the Department of Communication Arts that created Media Services1974-1975318Packet: CCESN Distance Learning Report, Working with the Media, List of CCESN Sitesdate unknown319Media Services managers meetings1994-1996320Media Services senior staff meeting notes: Policy discussions etc.date unknown321Series III. Annual Reports/Budget Hearing and Program Planning MaterialsCharge policy documents1972-199041Description of technologies: Television, satellite, computer and the departments role for the University199542Survey of Media Services staff: Work, job satisfaction, policy and procedures198843Unit strategic plans199444Cornell Cooperative Extension publications study199245Merger attempts: Media Services and University Relations1995-199646Cornell Communication Studies1974-198447Program planning and budget hearing materials (1979-2000/01 FYS)1979-200148Communication audit1991-05-1991-1149Annual Reports of the Department1983-1984, 1986-1996410
Scope and Contents
From 1995/1996 on annual reports were included in the program planning and budget conferences held with Human Ecology, Agriculture and Life Sciences and Cornell Cooperative ExtensionMedia Services administrative committee files/meeting notes Etc.1975-1981, 1979-1982, 1980-1986411
Scope and Contents
The Administrative Committee for Media Services was created by the Broadhead Report. It consisted of the Deans of Agriculture, Human Ecology and the Director of Cornell Cooperative Extension. Meetings were called by the head of that committee but over the years were very infrequentSeries IV. MiscellaneousMedia Services first computer system: Xerox Star System1983-198451Printing reorganization198352Workshops/training sessions by Media Services staff for Cornell Cooperative Extension and facultydate unknown53Program planning/budget hearing documents1979-1980, 1985-199754Annual Reports1973-1976, 1977-198555Christopher Whittle: First Director of Media Services56Broadhead Report1974-197557Cornell Cooperative Extension: Public Awareness and Marketing Campaigns, Products, Files, Organization, Training Sessions by Robert Topor, David Watkins and Bill Boldtdate unknown58Cornell Cooperative Extension Associations Survey Results: Printing and Mailing Technologies by James Mason1994-199559Cornell Cooperative Extension Associations Survey on Printing and Mailing Technologies Raw Data by County1994-1995510Slides: Update on the 80sdate unknown511
Scope and Contents
Prepared by Media Services for CCEA self-study of the department's organization, services, funding issues, and relationships in preparation for an external review to be conducted2000-04-02-2000-04-06512 ======= Link to a partial finding aid.
